notes: This game plays, but has no sound. There are some tricks listed below, but I haven't tested them just yet myself.
title: Chantelise - A Tale of Two Sisters
Chantelise - A Tale of Two Sisters

notes: As others have noted, fullscreen not working, no sound without tweaks, and camera on gamepad seems to be stuck spinning left. Did not attempt to address any issues.
title: Chantelise - A Tale of Two Sisters

notes:
Runs well after following the tweak for installing directmusic/dsound with winetricks (protontricks), and using a slightly custom config for xboxdrv with Xbox360 controller to prevent camera spinning. I used the "default.xboxdrv" config file from the examples with changes: trigger-as-button=true / remap RZ axis to Y2

Direct command should be something like:
xboxdrv --detach-kernel-driver --silent --trigger-as-button --axismap TL=BTN_THUMBL,TR=BTN_THUMBR --ui-axismap Y2=ABS_RZ,RT=ABS_RY
title: Chantelise - A Tale of Two Sisters
